_comment: Manual curation map for SBOM enrichment of `raidio:category == 'System Tools'`. Each component in generate_sbom.py SYSTEM_TOOLS needs an entry here, keyed by `<name>@<version>`. ffmpeg + python are not pip/cargo/npm packages so there's no canonical tarball-resolver origin — these entries name the source archive explicitly. When SYSTEM_TOOLS gains a new entry, a corresponding entry MUST be added here or sbom_enrich.py logs `unresolvable-license` for it and the release push surfaces it for review.

copyright_seed: Copyright (c) FFmpeg developers. See the CREDITS file for the full author list.
ffmpeg@7.1.rationale: Shipped binary effective license is GPL-3.0-or-later per build flags --enable-gpl --enable-version3 verified locally via ffmpeg.exe -version. All four COPYING files concatenated into licenses[].license.text in declaration order: GPLv3 (effective), GPLv2 (inherited from older components), LGPLv2.1 (LGPL components present), LGPLv3 (LGPL components built against GPLv3 framework). CREDITS file appended as NOTICE.

CPython@3.12.10.rationale: PSF-2.0 LICENSE file at root preserves the full historical chain (Stichting Mathematisch Centrum / Amsterdam -> CNRI -> BeOpen.com -> Python Software Foundation). Single LICENSE file contains the complete attribution chain.
